subcodes.first_line: O sacred and blessed leaf of the divine Lote-Tree, which was raised up in the midst of the Paradise of the All-Merciful, and East and West [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه مقدسه مبارکه سدره الهیه در بحبوحه فردوس رحمانیه بلند شد و شرق و غرب
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha
